attributes.content:
## Overview

The Service Record card gives the workspace a structured home for vehicle/equipment maintenance record: date, service type, provider, cost, mileage.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Service Record acts as a canonical operational record. It keeps important facts, state changes, timestamps, and linked parties in one place so downstream workflows, approvals, and reporting can all rely on the same source of truth.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Calendar]]** -- Calendar can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Service Record.
- **[[Task]]** -- Service Record often creates follow-up work or is itself tracked through task execution.
- **[[Alert]]** -- Alert can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Service Record.
- **[[Workflow Playbook]]** -- Service Record can be created, reviewed, or progressed as one step inside a repeatable workflow.
- **[[Document]]** -- Service Record can link to longer-form supporting content when a lightweight card needs deeper context.
- **[[Recipe]]** -- Recipe can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Service Record.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Service Record as the structured home for vehicle/equipment maintenance record: date, service type, provider, cost, mileage and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Service Record when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Service Record stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.
